parsed.reason: The rationale clearly and accurately identifies the signal as a delivery update. It correctly notes the sender (baby supplies retailer), the specific order contents (diapers and wipes), and the key update information (shipped status, expected arrival time tomorrow by 8 PM). The rationale also appropriately characterizes it as a one-way notification requiring no reply, which correctly matches the signal content. The explanation is specific, concise, and directly supported by the email details.
